name: Get-EventSubscriber

options.name: -Force
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet gets all event subscribers, including subscribers for events that are hidden by using the SupportEvent parameter of `Register-ObjectEvent`, `Register-WmiEvent`, and `Register-EngineEvent`.

options.name: -SourceIdentifier
options.description: Specifies the SourceIdentifier property value that gets only the event subscribers. By default, `Get-EventSubscriber` gets all event subscribers in the session. Wildcards are not permitted. This parameter is case-sensitive.

name: -SubscriptionId
-Id
options.description: Specifies the subscription identifier that this cmdlet gets. By default, `Get-EventSubscriber` gets all event subscribers in the session.

description: Gets the event subscribers in the current session.
